creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
New port of Amaya.  This is the W3 development platform for 
	HTML 4.0.  This port requires Linux emulation.

Fix: 

This port is essentially just installing the Linux binary.  There
	is source code available for Amaya, but it requires Motif, which
	I don't have.  W3 has also not ported it to use Lesstif instead.
	It might be nice to have a native port if someone has Motif.  It
	didn't look that hard to do.
How-To-Repeat: 
	I have placed the port at:
		ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/incoming/amaya-1.0b.tar.gz
